1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (169 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

Førjulen 2025 - Stange kirkelige fellesråd

https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/stange-kirkelige-fellesrad/forsideoppslag/f%C3%B8rjulen%202025/
Avvik: 218 | Bestått: 106

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Form input has no label

Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

Add href attribute or use a button element

CRITICAL

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

Kirkene våre - Stange kirkelige fellesråd

https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/stange-kirkelige-fellesrad/kirkene-vare/
Avvik: 224 | Bestått: 119
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (9 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/globalassets/fellesrad/stange/ottestad-menighet/kirken.png"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/contentassets/49290acb13f1489bb434f5c096ab505f/_mg_0803.jpg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="/contentassets/93f6ec4fe33a4de2bfdde82665530594/_mg_0816.jpg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)

<img src="/globalassets/fellesrad/stange/stange%20menighet/stange_vinter.jpg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (169 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (5 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'streetsearch' appears 2 times

id="streetsearch"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'congregationsearch' appears 2 times

id="congregationsearch"
Each ID must be unique on the page

SERIOUS

id="streetname"

SERIOUS

id="streetnumber"

SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'code' appears 2 times

id="code"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (12 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search2024__input search2024__input-no-border" id="parishname" js-autocomplete-type="unit" name="parishname" placeholder="F.eks. Rygge sokn" required=""/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search2024__input search2024__input-no-border" id="streetname" js-autocomplete-type="ElectionPage" name="streetname" placeholder="F.eks. Stamhusveien"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search2024__input" id="streetnumber" maxlength="4" name="streetnumber" oninput="validateInputGatenr(event)" pattern="\d{0,4}" placeholder="F.eks. 1"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input autocomplete="off" class="search2024__input" id="code" maxlength="4" minlength="4" name="code" oninput="validateInputPostnr(event)" pattern="\d{0,4}" placeholder="F.eks. 1181" type="text"/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button class="styles2024-primary-button" id="congregationSearchButton" title="Søk" type="submit"> Søk <svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Dåp - Stange kirkelige fellesråd

https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/stange-kirkelige-fellesrad/dap/
Avvik: 217 | Bestått: 124
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

SERIOUS

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (167 avvik)

MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

Add href attribute or use a button element

CRITICAL

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

MODERATE

Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="footer-link" href="https://uustatus.no/nb/erklaringer/publisert/cf0065e1-cc1b-4a33-adf0-5d66460e484c" rel="noopener noereferrer" target="_blank">Tilgjengelighetserklæring</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'archive-list-wrap' appears 2 times

id="archive-list-wrap"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'manual-list-wrap-ul' appears 2 times

id="manual-list-wrap-ul"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (20 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

SERIOUS

Element has empty aria-label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

404 - Den norske kirke

https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/404/
Avvik: 195 | Bestått: 126
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 title="Lenker tilhørende artikkel">Lenker</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>

2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>

MINOR

Link text is very long (176 characters)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/nb-NO/church-of-norway/Ceremonies/baptism/" tabindex="-1"> <picture><source sizes="(max-width: 820px) 100vw, 400px" srcset="/globalassets/%20nasjonale%20bilder%20og%20blok
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Read more'

<a href="/nb-NO/church-of-norway/Ceremonies/baptism/" title="Les mer om Baptism in Church of Norway">Read more<i aria-hidden="true" class="dnk-icon angle-right-icon"></i></a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')

2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<input class="search-box" id="search-box-mobile" name="q" placeholder="" required="" type="search" value=""/>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button role="button" title="Søk">Søk</button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Bryllup - Stange kirkelige fellesråd

https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/stange-kirkelige-fellesrad/bryllup/
Avvik: 215 | Bestått: 109
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#e8eaed" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M784-120 532-372q-30 24-69 38t-83 14q-109 0-184.5-75.5T120-580q0-109 75.5-184.5T380-
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

Samisk kirkeliv - Samisk kirkeråd - Sámi girkoráđđi - Sáme girkoráde - Saemien gærhkoeraerie

https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/om-kirken/slik-styres-kirken/samisk-kirkeliv/
Avvik: 185 | Bestått: 122
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg id="coi-renew-svg" style="enable-background:new 0 0 304.4 304.4;" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 304.4 304.4" x="0px" xml:space="preserve" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['div', 'div']

<ul id="manual-list-wrap-ul"> <li class="archive-element"> <a aria-hidden="true" href="/nb-NO/om-kirken/slik-styres-kirken/samisk-kirkeliv/adasa---nyheter/ny%20s%C3%B8rsamisk%20aktivitetsbok/" tabinde
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 title="Lenker tilhørende artikkel">Lenker</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>

CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="search2024__input" disabled="" id="linkToCopy" style="flex: 1" type="text" value="https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/om-kirken/die-norwegische-kirche/"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__show-details" id="coiShowDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="summary-texts__hide-details" id="coiHideDetails" onclick="toggleDetails(this.id)" onkeypress="toggleDetails(this.id)" tabindex="0">Skjul detaljer</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator active" id="coiDeclarationIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Cookie-erklæring</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

<a class="coi-consent-banner__indicator" id="coiAboutIndicator" onclick="toggleIndicator(this)" onkeypress="toggleIndicator(this)" role="menuitem" tabindex="0">Om cookies</a>
Add href attribute or use a button element
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

MODERATE

Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

List contains non-li elements: ['div', 'div']

<ul class="congregations" id="manual-list-wrap-ul"> <li class="archive-element" style="height:200px;"> <h2><a href="/nb-NO/fellesrad/stange-kirkelige-fellesrad/Stanges-Menigheter/stange_menighet/">Sta
List elements (ul, ol) should only contain li children
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (170 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Link with onclick but no href is not keyboard accessible

Add href attribute or use a button element

CRITICAL

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>

Element has empty aria-label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

Datoer for konfirmasjon - Stange kirkelige fellesråd

https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/stange-kirkelige-fellesrad/konfirmasjon/datoer%20for%20konfirmasjon/
Avvik: 219 | Bestått: 107

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 title="Lenker tilhørende artikkel">Lenker</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

SVG is missing accessible name

Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="none" height="33" viewbox="0 0 32 33" width="32" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <g clip-path="url(#clip0_5802_5003)"> <path d="M22.667 9.34607H17.3337V12.0127H22.667C24.867 12.0127 26.
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg fill="#333" height="24px" viewbox="0 -960 960 960" width="24px" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <path d="m256-200-56-56 224-224-224-224 56-56 224 224 224-224 56 56-224 224 224 224-56 56-224-2
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2>Hva er en cookie?</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 title="Lenker tilhørende artikkel">Lenker</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'tabs' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input aria-label="Nødvendige" class="coi-consent-banner__category-expander" id="coi-consent-banner__category-expander-cookie_cat_necessary" name="tabs" type="radio"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (166 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link text is a URL

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Replace URL with descriptive text that explains the link destination
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement" target="_blank">https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/privacy/privacystatement</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<button aria-label="renew consent" id="Coi-Renew" onclick="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" onkeypress="javascript:CookieConsent.renew();" style="display: none;" tabindex="1" title="renew consent">
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only

MODERATE

Element has empty aria-label

<nav aria-hidden="true" aria-label="" class="nav nav-bar nav-local" style=""> <button aria-label="toppmeny" class="hamburger" tabindex="0"> <span class="hamburger__line"></span> <span class="hamburger
Provide descriptive text in aria-label or remove if not needed

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://www.kirken.no/nb-NO/fellesrad/stange-kirkelige-fellesrad/ --max-pages 16 --format html
